metadata.title: Le Xuan Thanh | Frontend Developer
metadata.description: Frontend Engineer with 3+ years of experience specializing in React, TypeScript, and performance optimization for data-heavy web applications and enterprise dashboards.

profile.name: Le Xuan Thanh

headline.line1: Building high-performance web apps with seamless UX.

profile.subtext: I am a Frontend Engineer with over 3 years of hands-on experience in React and TypeScript. I specialize in turning complex business logic and massive datasets into intuitive, clean, and highly optimized dashboards.

philosophy.title: My Approach
clauses: I prioritize clean, maintainable code and scalable folder architectures right from the first commit.
By leveraging TypeScript to eliminate runtime bugs and integrating closely with Design Systems, I optimize delivery speed without compromising quality.
A great UI is more than just looks—it must remain responsive under heavy data loads and deliver a flawless user experience.

core.title: React & State Management
core.description: Proficient in React and TypeScript. Experienced in managing complex global states using Zustand and Redux Toolkit, and optimizing server state with React Query (TanStack Query).

motion.title: Speed & Efficiency
motion.description:
• Reduced dashboard initial load time to under 1 second.
• Cut redundant API requests by 40% using smart caching, throttling, and debouncing strategies.
• Eliminated unnecessary re-renders in data-heavy tables and charts.

system.title: Component Engineering
system.description: Deep experience working with Ant Design, Tailwind CSS, and Material UI. Skilled in building modular, reusable UI components that boost team development speed by 30%.

tooling.title: GitFlow & Engineering Culture
tooling.description: Strict adherence to GitFlow and a strong advocate for thorough Code Reviews. Familiar with Agile/Scrum environments and experienced in configuring and deploying builds on IIS Servers.

creative.title: Fintech & Enterprise Security
creative.description: Experienced in handling high-security banking features: Enterprise authentication via Azure AD (OAuth2), automated JWT silent refresh tokens, and seamless Core Banking data synchronization.

list.title: International Money Transfer System
list.category: Frontend Developer | Fintech & Core Banking Integration

experience.summary: Developed and maintained enterprise-grade web applications for 15,000+ internal employees across Retail Banking and SME divisions.
highlights: Standardized reusable component library cutting 30% dev time
Optimized dashboard load time by 1s via React Query caching
Implemented Azure AD OAuth2 + JWT silent refresh flow
Integrated Core Banking data sync and Excel import/export

footer.title: Contact
footer.signature:
